chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1250 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «إِذَا رَأَيْتُمُ اَلشَّيْخَ يُحَدِّثُ يَوْمَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ بِأَحَادِيثِ اَلْجَاهِلِيَّةِ فَارْمُوا رَأْسَهُ وَ لَوْ بِالْحَصَى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1250 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said: "If you see an elder discussing stories of the pre-Islamic era (Jahiliyyah) on the day of Jumu’ah, throw stones at his head, even if with pebbles”.
